## Meeting Purpose

[Review account status, discuss resource planning, and address operational challenges.](https://fathom.video/share/uxsikA4sHT6n3S9vxek647h6JzdRfX2v?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Resource constraints are impacting kickoff scheduling; pushing some to April to ensure quality onboarding](https://fathom.video/share/uxsikA4sHT6n3S9vxek647h6JzdRfX2v?tab=summary&timestamp=1836.0)
  - [Attention account pivoting to month-to-month strategy; requires careful handling](https://fathom.video/share/uxsikA4sHT6n3S9vxek647h6JzdRfX2v?tab=summary&timestamp=3000.0)
  - [New hires (managing editor, recruiter, finance person) starting soon to address capacity issues](https://fathom.video/share/uxsikA4sHT6n3S9vxek647h6JzdRfX2v?tab=summary&timestamp=2263.0)
  - [Need to improve expectation setting and reporting on results/conversions for clients](https://fathom.video/share/uxsikA4sHT6n3S9vxek647h6JzdRfX2v?tab=summary&timestamp=598.0)

## Topics

### Resource Planning and Hiring

  - [Currently at 40+ accounts, $6 million AR (up from \~15 accounts, $1.3 million AR in October)](https://fathom.video/share/uxsikA4sHT6n3S9vxek647h6JzdRfX2v?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Hiring two months ahead of projections; aiming for 100 customers by year-end](https://fathom.video/share/uxsikA4sHT6n3S9vxek647h6JzdRfX2v?tab=summary&timestamp=2056.0)
  - [New hires: Sydney (managing editor) starting next week, Mara (director) joining on 3/17](https://fathom.video/share/uxsikA4sHT6n3S9vxek647h6JzdRfX2v?tab=summary&timestamp=2207.0)
  - [Recruiter starting Monday to handle hiring process](https://fathom.video/share/uxsikA4sHT6n3S9vxek647h6JzdRfX2v?tab=summary&timestamp=2263.0)
  - [Finance person (Erickson) starting Monday to manage invoicing and accounts receivable](https://fathom.video/share/uxsikA4sHT6n3S9vxek647h6JzdRfX2v?tab=summary&timestamp=3150.0)

### Account Management Challenges

  - [Attention account: Pivoting to month-to-month strategy, requires careful expectation setting](https://fathom.video/share/uxsikA4sHT6n3S9vxek647h6JzdRfX2v?tab=summary&timestamp=3000.0)
  - [Auto-publishing capabilities: Not currently available, but on the roadmap for future development](https://fathom.video/share/uxsikA4sHT6n3S9vxek647h6JzdRfX2v?tab=summary&timestamp=3217.0)
  - [Misaligned expectations: Some clients expect immediate results or have unrealistic conversion goals](https://fathom.video/share/uxsikA4sHT6n3S9vxek647h6JzdRfX2v?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

### Sales and Onboarding Process

  - [Need to improve qualification process to identify good-fit clients](https://fathom.video/share/uxsikA4sHT6n3S9vxek647h6JzdRfX2v?tab=summary&timestamp=2763.0)
  - [Developing questions to assess client's current state and readiness for content marketing](https://fathom.video/share/uxsikA4sHT6n3S9vxek647h6JzdRfX2v?tab=summary&timestamp=2763.0)
  - [Creating handover notes for smooth transitions from sales to account management](https://fathom.video/share/uxsikA4sHT6n3S9vxek647h6JzdRfX2v?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)

### Reporting and Results

  - [Improving how results and conversions are communicated to clients](https://fathom.video/share/uxsikA4sHT6n3S9vxek647h6JzdRfX2v?tab=summary&timestamp=688.0)
  - [Balancing traffic growth with meaningful metrics that impact client's bottom line](https://fathom.video/share/uxsikA4sHT6n3S9vxek647h6JzdRfX2v?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Developing more structured reporting processes and SOPs](https://fathom.video/share/uxsikA4sHT6n3S9vxek647h6JzdRfX2v?tab=summary&timestamp=616.0)

### Team Structure and Meetings

  - [Considering promoting Pertik to pod lead role due to strong performance](https://fathom.video/share/uxsikA4sHT6n3S9vxek647h6JzdRfX2v?tab=summary&timestamp=2412.0)
  - [Need to formalize more ongoing meetings as the team grows and matures](https://fathom.video/share/uxsikA4sHT6n3S9vxek647h6JzdRfX2v?tab=summary&timestamp=3360.0)
  - [Jacob (new hire) to schedule onboarding meetings with team members](https://fathom.video/share/uxsikA4sHT6n3S9vxek647h6JzdRfX2v?tab=summary&timestamp=3481.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Push some kickoffs to April to ensure quality onboarding and resource availability](https://fathom.video/share/uxsikA4sHT6n3S9vxek647h6JzdRfX2v?tab=summary&timestamp=1818.0)
  - [Finalize headcount modeling and hiring plans this week](https://fathom.video/share/uxsikA4sHT6n3S9vxek647h6JzdRfX2v?tab=summary&timestamp=2056.0)
  - [Create handover notes template for smoother account transitions](https://fathom.video/share/uxsikA4sHT6n3S9vxek647h6JzdRfX2v?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Develop questions for sales team to better qualify potential clients](https://fathom.video/share/uxsikA4sHT6n3S9vxek647h6JzdRfX2v?tab=summary&timestamp=2763.0)
  - [Schedule onboarding meetings for Jacob with team members](https://fathom.video/share/uxsikA4sHT6n3S9vxek647h6JzdRfX2v?tab=summary&timestamp=3481.0)
  - [Review and update how Attention account is handled in forecasting and billing systems](https://fathom.video/share/uxsikA4sHT6n3S9vxek647h6JzdRfX2v?tab=summary&timestamp=3054.0)
